◎简　　介  

　　Alien bounty hunters from another planet are sent to stop Tanash, a possessed demonic serial killer who comes to earth to take over the bodies of humans before killing them. Staleth, played by Geovanni Molina and Colinus, played by Jay D Lee, are sent to stop him as Earth's only hope.
introduction: Alien bounty hunters from another planet are sent to stop Tanash, a possessed demonic serial killer who comes to earth to take over the bodies of humans before killing them. Staleth, played by Geovanni Molina and Colinus, played by Jay D Lee, are sent to stop him as Earth's only hope.
